title: lasianthus iteoides
intro: Lasianthus iteoides, a species of plant in the family Theaceae, is a type of flowering shrub native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating cough, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, Lasianthus iteoides is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for its active compounds to be absorbed and utilized for medicinal purposes.
